title: Large Language Models for Software Vulnerability Detection: A Survey of Methods, Evaluation, and Future Trends
authors: Canpeng Li, Yanghui Tan, Jie Zheng
publish: 2026 International Conference on Generative Artificial Intelligence and Information Security (GAIIS)
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have recently achieved rapid progress and are being increasingly adopted across a wide range of software engineering tasks. Owing to their strong capabilities in code understanding, natural-language alignment, and generative reasoning, they have emerged as a promising development for software vulnerability detection. Based on the current research landscape and 32 representative studies, this article mainly elaborates from four perspectives: research evolution, methodological design, evaluation practice, and future directions, aiming to advance technological innovation and deliver forward-looking insights. Existing evidence suggests that direct prompting enables fast transfer to vulnerability detection, but its effectiveness remains constrained by benchmark quality, insufficient context, prompt sensitivity, and limited robustness. In contrast, context enhancement, program-analysis guidance, retrieval augmentation, specification-guided reasoning, and collaborative decision-making generally yield more stable improvements in recall, F1 score, and explanatory utility. Overall, the development of software vulnerability detection in the next stage is unlikely to be driven by model scaling alone. Instead, it will depend on the integration of high-quality datasets, structured program evidence, explicit security constraints, and verifiable reasoning pipelines.
title_zh: 大型语言模型用于软件漏洞检测：方法、评估与未来趋势综述
abstract_zh: 大语言模型（LLMs）近期发展迅速，正被日益广泛地应用于各类软件工程任务。凭借其在代码理解、自然语言对齐和生成式推理方面的强大能力，它们已成为软件漏洞检测领域颇具前景的发展方向。基于当前研究现状和32项代表性研究，本文主要从研究演进、方法设计、评估实践和未来方向四个维度展开阐述，旨在推动技术创新并提供前瞻性见解。现有证据表明，直接提示（prompting）能够快速迁移至漏洞检测任务，但其有效性仍受到基准质量、上下文不足、提示敏感性和鲁棒性有限的制约。相比之下，上下文增强、程序分析引导、检索增强、规范引导推理以及协同决策通常能在召回率、F1分数和可解释性方面带来更稳定的提升。总体而言，下一阶段软件漏洞检测的发展不太可能仅依靠模型规模扩展来驱动，而是将依赖于高质量数据集、结构化程序证据、明确的安全约束以及可验证推理管线的整合。

title: Graph Contrastive Learning for Function-Level Code Vulnerability Detection
authors: Kunfeng Du
publish: 2026 9th International Conference on Advanced Electronic Technology, Computers and Software Engineering (AETCSE)
abstract: Source code vulnerability detection is critical for software security. While Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) capture code semantics, existing methods often fail to represent deep semantic and complex structural dependencies. We propose GCL-FVD, a novel function-level detection model based on Graph Contrastive Learning. GCL-FVD first constructs an extended Abstract Syntax Trees to capture program logic. It then employs a multi-branch contrastive framework with graph augmentation and a momentum update mechanism to learn robust representations across views. Finally, a joint optimization loss enhances feature discriminability. Experimental results on public datasets demonstrate that GCL-FVD significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods in detecting complex vulnerabilities.
title_zh: 面向函数级代码漏洞检测的图对比学习
abstract_zh: 源代码漏洞检测对软件安全至关重要。尽管图神经网络（GNN）能够捕捉代码语义，但现有方法往往难以表示深层语义和复杂结构依赖。我们提出GCL-FVD——一种基于图对比学习的新型函数级检测模型。该模型首先构建扩展的抽象语法树以捕获程序逻辑，接着采用包含图增强和动量更新机制的多分支对比框架来学习跨视图的鲁棒表示，最后通过联合优化损失增强特征可区分性。在公开数据集上的实验结果表明，GCL-FVD在检测复杂漏洞方面显著优于现有最先进方法。

title: DrlGoFPGA 2.0: FPGA Global Placement Based on Multi-Agent Graph Transformers and Nonlinear Placement Co-Optimization
authors: Kang Yang, Jianwang Zhai, Liuyu Xiang, Kang Zhao, Wei Li, Ming Lei, Zhaofeng He
publish: IEEE Transactions on Computer-Aided Design of Integrated Circuits and Systems
abstract: The speed and quality of global placement (GP) are crucial for FPGA performance. The existing nonlinear placers provide higher computational efficiency than heuristic algorithms, but their insufficient attention to the initialization of GP distributions limits rapid convergence towards high-quality global optimal solutions. To resolve this, we propose a GP framework, DrlGoFPGA 2.0, combining LUT, FF, DSP, and RAM (LFDR) instance placement generation based on multi-agent graph transformer network (MAGTN) and LFDR initial placement fine-tuning based on nonlinear placement. A MAGTN model for LFDR initial placement is designed, which utilizes distributed training to circumvent the issues of sub-optimal placement models and prolonged training times due to the non-uniform distribution of large-scale LFDR sites. A lightweight LFDR line-network relationships (LNR) graph supporting MAGTN co-decision is created by separating, renumbering, and deduplicating the LNR graph containing all instances, and inputting the LFDR LNR graph into MAGTN to obtain the connections between LFDRs. The experimental results on ISPD’2016/2017 benchmarks show that compared with the state-of-the-art (SOTA) nonlinear placer, DrlGoFPGA 2.0 can improve GP speed by 27.3% ∼ 82.1%, reduce half-perimeter wirelength by 0.6% ∼ 4.6%, and routed wirelength by 0.4% ∼ 2.8%.
title_zh: DrlGoFPGA 2.0: 基于多智能体图变换器和非线性布局协同优化的FPGA全局布局
abstract_zh: 全局布局（GP）的速度和质量对FPGA性能至关重要。现有的非线性布局器相比启发式算法具有更高的计算效率，但它们对GP分布初始化的关注不足，限制了向高质量全局最优解的快速收敛。为解决这一问题，我们提出了一种GP框架DrlGoFPGA 2.0，该框架结合了基于多智能体图变换器网络（MAGTN）的LUT、FF、DSP和RAM（LFDR）实例布局生成，以及基于非线性布局的LFDR初始布局微调。设计了一种用于LFDR初始布局的MAGTN模型，该模型利用分布式训练来规避由于大规模LFDR站点分布不均匀而导致的布局模型次优和训练时间过长的问题。通过分离、重新编号和去重包含所有实例的LNR图，创建了一个支持MAGTN协同决策的轻量级LFDR线网关系（LNR）图，并将该LFDR LNR图输入MAGTN以获取LFDR之间的连接关系。在ISPD'2016/2017基准测试上的实验结果表明，与最先进的（SOTA）非线性布局器相比，DrlGoFPGA 2.0可以将GP速度提高27.3%∼82.1%，半周长线长减少0.6%∼4.6%，布线线长减少0.4%∼2.8%。

title: Automated Binary Code Analysis Technology Enhanced by Variable Knowledge Graph
authors: Shunda Meng, Bing Xia, Yi Lin, Jiabin Yin
publish: 2026 International Conference on Generative Artificial Intelligence and Information Security (GAIIS)
abstract: With the escalating threats to software supply chain security, binary code analysis plays a critical role in malicious software detection, vulnerability mining, and software composition analysis. However, traditional binary analysis techniques face challenges such as symbol removal, contextual semantic fragmentation, and obfuscation interference. Although emerging large language models (LLMs) possess strong semantic understanding capabilities, they often suffer from hallucinations due to a lack of domain-specific knowledge. This paper proposes an automated binary code analysis technique enhanced by a Variable Knowledge Graph (VKG). The approach first extracts variable-level entities and relationships through decompilation and static analysis, constructing a structured VKG stored in Neo4j. Second, it designs a graph-text joint reasoning engine based on ToG-2 (Think-on-Graph 2.0), which leverages multi-hop retrieval to obtain deep dataflow information from the VKG and integrates external heterogeneous textual knowledge to guide LLMs in interpretable semantic recovery. Experimental results demonstrate that, compared with traditional static analysis tools and pure LLM baselines, this technique improves function identification accuracy by 18.5% and achieves an F1 score of 0.83 in variable semantic recovery, significantly reducing model hallucination rates.
title_zh: 基于变量知识图谱增强的自动化二进制代码分析技术
abstract_zh: 随着软件供应链安全威胁的不断升级，二进制代码分析在恶意软件检测、漏洞挖掘及软件成分分析中扮演着关键角色。然而，传统的二进制分析技术面临符号移除、上下文语义碎片化及混淆干扰等挑战。尽管新兴的大语言模型（LLM）具备强大的语义理解能力，但常因缺乏领域专业知识而产生幻觉现象。本文提出了一种基于变量知识图谱（VKG）增强的自动化二进制代码分析技术。该方法首先通过反编译与静态分析提取变量级实体及其关系，构建结构化的VKG并存储于Neo4j中；其次，设计基于ToG-2（Think-on-Graph 2.0）的图-文本联合推理引擎，通过多跳检索获取VKG中的深度数据流信息，并融合外部异构文本知识，引导LLM进行可解释的语义恢复。实验结果表明，与传统静态分析工具及纯LLM基线相比，该技术将函数识别准确率提升18.5%，变量语义恢复的F1分数达到0.83，显著降低了模型幻觉率。

title: Timing Yield-Driven Clock Skew Scheduling Based on Hybrid Distributions
authors: Kaixiang Zhu, Jiangnan Li, Lingli Wang, Wai-Shing Luk
publish: IEEE Transactions on Computer-Aided Design of Integrated Circuits and Systems
abstract: Clock skew scheduling is a cost-effective technique for enhancing synchronous digital VLSI systems. The technique simply involves adjusting the clock skew to meet signal path timing constraints in order to increase the clock frequency or timing yield. Traditionally, Gaussian distributions have been assumed for path delays under process variations. However, this assumption may be inappropriate due to the notable asymmetry of actual path delay distributions. In this paper, we propose the generalized extreme value (GEV) distribution as a potential alternative, along with a hybrid distribution approach that utilizes different distributions for different path delays to improve accuracy. We also analyze three parameter estimation methods: Maximum likelihood estimation (MLE), L-moments, and the method of moments (MoM) to evaluate the accuracy of the fit. Our experimental results show that the GEV distribution more accurately approximates path delays in benchmark circuits, achieving an average improvement of 40% and 30% in the Kolmogorov-Smirnov (KS) statistic compared to the Gaussian and Lognormal distributions, respectively. In addition, Q-Q (Quantile-Quantile) and P-P (Probability-Probability) plots are employed to visually validate the goodness-of-fit for different distributions. For timing yield-driven CSS, the hybrid method achieves the highest performance, improving yield by an average of 6% over the Gaussian model and by 2% over the GEV-based model. These results demonstrate that the hybrid distribution approach effectively captures heterogeneous path behavior and provides robust yield optimization.
title_zh: 基于混合分布的时序良率驱动时钟偏移调度
abstract_zh: 时钟偏移调度是一种经济有效的技术，用于增强同步数字VLSI系统。该技术通过调整时钟偏移以满足信号路径时序约束，从而提高时钟频率或时序良率。传统上，在工艺变化下，路径延迟通常被假定服从高斯分布。然而，由于实际路径延迟分布存在显著的不对称性，这一假设可能不适用。本文提出了广义极值分布作为潜在替代方案，并采用一种混合分布方法，针对不同路径延迟使用不同分布以提高准确性。我们还分析了三种参数估计方法：最大似然估计、L矩法和矩法，以评估拟合精度。实验结果表明，在基准电路中，广义极值分布能更准确地逼近路径延迟，与高斯分布和对数正态分布相比，在Kolmogorov-Smirnov统计量上分别平均提升40%和30%。此外，通过Q-Q图和P-P图直观验证了不同分布的拟合优度。在面向时序良率的时钟偏移调度中，混合方法实现了最高性能，良率比高斯模型平均提高6%，比基于广义极值分布的模型提高2%。这些结果表明，混合分布方法能有效捕捉异质路径行为，并提供稳健的良率优化。

title: SPCMap: A Power-Aware and Compilation-Efficient Mapping Framework for Heterogeneous CGRAs in Onboard SAR Imaging
authors: Yongrui Li, Liang Chen, Han Li, Hao Shi, Yizhuang Xie, Chao Wang, Wei Li, Linlin Ge
publish: IEEE Journal of Selected Topics in Applied Earth Observations and Remote Sensing
abstract: Onboard real-time Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) imaging is essential for time-sensitive applications but faces strict power constraints on satellites. Heterogeneous Coarse-Grained Reconfigurable Arrays (CGRAs) with circuit-switched networks offer an efficient and flexible platform for SAR computing, yet existing mapping methods fail to jointly optimize power and compilation time efficiency. This paper introduces SPCMap, a SAR-aware mapping framework for heterogeneous CGRAs that tackles this joint challenge. SPCMap features four innovations: (1) a power-aware Modulo Routing Resource Graph (MRRG) modeling method for accurate power estimation; (2) an anchor diffusion method leveraging the multi-source convergence pattern of SAR data flows to prune the search space; (3) a non-greedy progressive search method to escape local optima; and (4) a parameterized active backtracking method for robustness. Evaluated on 13 real SAR Data Flow Graphs (DFGs) using a 12-nm CGRA platform, SPCMap achieves 100% mapping success. It reduces router power by up to 62.7%, with an average deviation of only 2.4% from the theoretical optimum, while keeping compilation time within 1.4× of the fastest greedy baseline. Ablation studies confirm the contribution of each component. In cross-platform comparisons, the proposed CGRA with SPCMap attains a leading normalized energy efficiency of 3.44×10<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">7</sup> pixel<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</sup>/s/W, outperforming existing processors. SPCMap thus balances power, compilation time, and reliability, providing a practical compilation solution for energy-efficient onboard SAR imaging.
title_zh: SPCMap: 一种面向机载SAR成像中异构CGRA的功耗感知与编译高效映射框架
abstract_zh: 星载实时合成孔径雷达（SAR）成像是时间敏感型应用的关键技术，但卫星上存在严格的功耗限制。带有电路交换网络的异构粗粒度可重构阵列（CGRA）为SAR计算提供了高效且灵活的平台，然而现有映射方法无法同时优化功耗和编译时间效率。本文提出了SPCMap，一种面向异构CGRA的SAR感知映射框架，旨在解决这一联合优化挑战。SPCMap包含四项创新：（1）一种面向功耗的模数路由资源图（MRRG）建模方法，用于精确的功耗估计；（2）利用SAR数据流多源汇聚模式的锚点扩散方法，以剪枝搜索空间；（3）一种非贪婪的渐进搜索方法，用于逃离局部最优；（4）一种参数化主动回溯方法，以增强鲁棒性。在12纳米CGRA平台上对13个真实SAR数据流图（DFG）进行评估，SPCMap实现了100%的映射成功率。它最多可降低62.7%的路由器功耗，与理论最优值的平均偏差仅为2.4%，同时编译时间控制在最快贪心基线的1.4倍以内。消融研究证实了每个组件的贡献。在跨平台比较中，采用SPCMap的CGRA实现了领先的归一化能效3.44×10<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">7</sup>像素<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</sup>/秒/瓦特，优于现有处理器。因此，SPCMap在功耗、编译时间和可靠性之间取得了平衡，为节能的星载SAR成像提供了实用的编译解决方案。

title: A Novel Surrogate Modeling Framework Based on Fast Time-Domain Simulation and Transfer Learning for Signal Integrity Analysis
authors: Meng-Yi Yu, Chang-Sheng Mao, Da-Wei Wang, Wen-Sheng Zhao
publish: IEEE Transactions on Components, Packaging and Manufacturing Technology
abstract: In high-speed electronic systems, signal integrity (SI) issues become increasingly prominent as the operating frequencies rise and integration levels deepen, making accurate SI modeling a key requirement. This paper presents a modeling framework that combines fast time-domain simulation with transfer learning to reduce the computational cost of transient and electromagnetic simulations while building high-accuracy surrogate models. In the source domain, circuit simulation along with the multiple edge response method is used to generate large-scale transient waveforms and worst-case eye diagrams for pretraining neural networks. The target domain uses S-parameters extracted from electromagnetic simulation to construct interconnect models, and transient simulation is performed to obtain high-fidelity output responses. Subsequently, deep neural network and temporal convolutional network are used as surrogate models for geometric parameter-to-eye diagram metrics mapping and input-output waveform mapping tasks, respectively, where the eye diagram metrics include eye height, eye width, and jitter peak-to-peak. The knowledge learned from the source domain is transferred to transient simulation data in the target domain using either fine-tuning or partial-freezing strategies, which further enhance the performance under limited data scenarios, thereby validating the framework’s adaptability and robustness across diverse tasks and system configurations.
title_zh: 一种基于快速时域仿真和迁移学习的新型代理建模框架用于信号完整性分析
abstract_zh: 在高速电子系统中，随着工作频率的提高和集成度的加深，信号完整性（SI）问题日益突出，准确的SI建模成为关键需求。本文提出了一种建模框架，将快速时域仿真与迁移学习相结合，在构建高精度代理模型的同时，降低瞬态和电磁仿真的计算成本。在源域中，利用电路仿真与多边沿响应方法生成大规模瞬态波形和最坏情况眼图，用于预训练神经网络。目标域则使用从电磁仿真中提取的S参数构建互连模型，并进行瞬态仿真以获得高保真输出响应。随后，使用深度神经网络和时间卷积网络分别作为几何参数到眼图指标映射和输入-输出波形映射任务的代理模型，其中眼图指标包括眼高、眼宽和抖动峰峰值。通过微调或部分冻结策略，将源域学到的知识迁移至目标域的瞬态仿真数据中，从而在数据有限的场景下进一步提升性能，验证了该框架在不同任务和系统配置下的适应性和鲁棒性。

title: IEEE Bulgaria Section Jt. Chapter CAS04/SSC37 Hosts CASS Distinguished Lecturer Prof. Ricardo Reis [CASS Chapter Highlights]
authors: Valeri Mladenov
publish: IEEE Circuits and Systems Magazine
abstract: As part of the IEEE Circuits and Systems Society Distinguished Lecturer (DL) Program, Prof. Ricardo Reis visited Bulgaria in November 2025 and delivered two invited lectures hosted by the Bulgarian CASS Chapter and Bulgarian universities. Invited by Prof. Valeri Mladenov, Chair of the IEEE Bulgaria Section Joint Chapter CAS04/SSC37, the lectures addressed both emerging trends and advanced methodologies in microelectronics and physical design automation. The events attracted strong interest from the academic community and contributed to strengthening collaboration between the IEEE Circuits and Systems community and academic institutions in Bulgaria.
title_zh: IEEE保加利亚分会联合分会CAS04/SSC37接待CASS杰出讲师Ricardo Reis教授 [CASS分会亮点]
abstract_zh: 作为IEEE电路与系统学会杰出讲师计划的一部分，Ricardo Reis教授于2025年11月访问保加利亚，并在保加利亚CASS分会及多所大学的主办下发表了两次特邀讲座。应IEEE保加利亚分会联合分会CAS04/SSC37主席Valeri Mladenov教授之邀，讲座内容涵盖了微电子与物理设计自动化领域的新兴趋势与先进方法。这些活动引起了学术界的浓厚兴趣，并为加强IEEE电路与系统学会与保加利亚学术机构之间的合作做出了贡献。

title: Responsible Integration of Generative AI in Software Engineering Education
authors: Miguel Matey-Sanz, Carlos Granell, Ramón A. Mollineda
publish: IEEE Revista Iberoamericana de Tecnologias del Aprendizaje
abstract: Generative AI (GenAI) is rapidly transforming higher education, requiring a consequent shift in teaching methodologies. This article describes a two-year teaching experience (2024/2025 and 2025/2026) integrating the free, responsible, and critical use of GenAI into a coordinated, complex software development project for fourth-year Computer Science students. The study aimed to explore GenAI’s potential as a learning support tool across the software lifecycle and analyze student interaction patterns. The methodology evolved over two academic years: an initial exploratory phase (2024/2025) was followed by a revised implementation (2025/2026) that incorporated active training seminars focused on prompt engineering and critical analysis. Results show that GenAI is highly effective as a “companion” for automating low-level tasks such as code implementation, debugging, and test scenario specification, allowing students to focus on higher-level design and decision making. Initial findings revealed student frustration when GenAI struggled to reason about advanced project contexts, often due to a lack of prompt expertise. However, the corrective training actions successfully mitigated this frustration, significantly improving the critical interpretation of GenAI-generated outputs and the control of “hallucinations”. Usage patterns were asymmetric, with general-purpose tools dominating early stages and specialized tools gaining relevance as project complexity increased. This experience confirms the value of GenAI in promoting critical and responsible use within software engineering education, supporting a shift from a basic skill focus to one centered on analysis, integration, and high-level problem-solving.
title_zh: 负责任地将生成式AI整合到软件工程教育中
abstract_zh: 生成式人工智能（GenAI）正在迅速改变高等教育，促使教学方法相应转变。本文描述了一项为期两年的教学实践（2024/2025学年和2025/2026学年），将GenAI的自由、负责任和批判性使用融入计算机科学专业四年级学生的协调式复杂软件开发项目中。该研究旨在探索GenAI作为学习支持工具在整个软件生命周期中的潜力，并分析学生的交互模式。教学方法在两个学年中逐步演进：初始探索阶段（2024/2025学年）之后，实施了修订版方案（2025/2026学年），新增了聚焦于提示工程和批判性分析的主动培训研讨会。结果显示，GenAI作为“伙伴”在自动化低层次任务（如代码实现、调试和测试场景规范）方面极为高效，使学生能专注于更高层次的设计与决策。初步发现表明，当GenAI因缺乏提示专业知识而难以推理高级项目背景时，学生会产生挫败感。然而，后续的纠正性培训措施成功缓解了这种挫败感，显著提升了对GenAI生成结果的批判性解读能力以及对“幻觉”的控制。使用模式呈现不对称性：通用工具在早期阶段占主导地位，而专用工具在项目复杂度增加时变得更相关。这一实践证实了GenAI在软件工程教育中促进批判性和负责任使用的价值，支持从基本技能培养向分析、整合和高阶问题解决中心的转变。

title: A Framework for Chiplet Authentication During Post-Stacking Test
authors: Juan Suzano, Anthony Philippe, Fady Abouzeid, Philippe Roche, Giorgio Di Natale
publish: 2026 IEEE 29th International Symposium on Design and Diagnostics of Electronic Circuits and Systems (DDECS)
abstract: The semiconductor industry is adopting chiplets as an alternative to integrated circuit design. With adoption of off-the-shelf chiplets, supply chain attacks are likely to increase, making chiplet authentication essential. This work identifies post-stacking testing as the best phase for authentication and proposes a framework using existing industry standards. The framework includes a flexible authentication IP integrated into the chiplet design, compatible with various authentication methods; an IP insertion flow compatible with commercial DFT insertion tools; a secure module for the test environment; and the corresponding test procedure. Results show that chiplet authentication can be implemented without disrupting industry practices, with multiple authentication methods available based on the context.
title_zh: 堆叠后测试中的芯粒认证框架
abstract_zh: 半导体行业正采用小芯片作为集成电路设计的替代方案。随着现成小芯片的普及，供应链攻击的可能性随之增加，因此小芯片认证变得至关重要。本研究将堆叠后测试确定为认证的最佳阶段，并提出了一个基于现有行业标准的框架。该框架包括：一个集成到小芯片设计中的灵活认证IP，兼容多种认证方法；一个与商用DFT插入工具兼容的IP插入流程；测试环境的安全模块；以及相应的测试程序。研究结果表明，小芯片认证可以在不干扰行业实践的情况下实施，并且可根据具体场景选择多种认证方法。

title: How Software Engineers Engage with AI: A Pragmatic Workflow
authors: Vəhid Gəruslu, Zafar Jafarov, Aytan Mövsümova, Atif Namazov
publish: IEEE Software
abstract: Artificial Intelligence (AI) tools such as GitHub Copilot and ChatGPT are increasingly used in software engineering (SE) for tasks such as code, test, and documentation generation. However, engineers often face uncertainty about when to trust, refine, or discard AI-generated artifacts. We present a pragmatic workflow, complemented by a four-quadrant decision model, that formalizes how developers iteratively prompt, inspect, refine, and, when needed, fall back to manual work. The workflow and decision model were derived from a grey literature review and field observations across three industrial settings in Türkiye and Azerbaijan. Two realworld scenarios demonstrate the workflow’s practical value, showing how engineers navigate key decision points when using AI. Our approach offers lightweight, semi-formalization of the decision-making process engineers already follow – implicitly or explicitly – when engaging with AI tools in everyday SE tasks, supporting more deliberate and quality-aware use of AI.".
title_zh: 软件工程师如何与AI互动：一个实用工作流程
abstract_zh: 人工智能（AI）工具如GitHub Copilot和ChatGPT正越来越多地应用于软件工程（SE）领域，用于执行代码、测试和文档生成等任务。然而，工程师们常常面临不确定性：何时信任、优化或舍弃AI生成的产物。我们提出了一种实用工作流，辅以四象限决策模型，形式化了开发者如何迭代地进行提示、检查、优化，并在必要时退回至手动操作。该工作流和决策模型源自灰色文献综述以及在土耳其和阿塞拜疆三个工业环境中的实地观察。两个真实场景展示了该工作流的使用价值，揭示了工程师在使用AI时如何应对关键决策点。我们的方法为工程师在日常软件工程任务中与AI工具交互时已经遵循——无论显式还是隐式——的决策过程提供了轻量级、半形式化的支持，从而促进更加审慎且关注质量的AI使用。

title: NAVIGATE: Multi-Agent Graph-Based Vulnerability Detection with Adversarial Severity Assessment
authors: Yang Guo
publish: 2026 International Conference on Generative Artificial Intelligence and Information Security (GAIIS)
abstract: Automated vulnerability severity assessment is critical for prioritizing security remediation efforts, yet existing approaches face significant challenges. Traditional text-based methods rely solely on vulnerability descriptions, lacking the technical depth present in source code. Meanwhile, Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown promise in code understanding but struggle with long input sequences and lack structured semantic information, leading to unreliable severity predictions. This paper presents NAVIGATE, a multi-agent graph-centric framework that synergizes Code Property Graphs (CPGs) with LLM-powered reasoning for automated vulnerability severity assessment. A key innovation is the deployment of an autonomous ReAct (Reasoning + Acting) agent with a documentation subagent for dynamic query generation, enabling the discovery of complex vulnerability patterns without relying on predefined static rules. Another core contribution is the adversarial multi-agent debate mechanism using AG2 (AutoGen 2), where Security Analyst, Red Team Expert, Blue Team Expert, and Severity Judge agents engage in structured deliberation to achieve consensus-based severity ratings. Our approach employs a multi-stage pipeline comprising: (1) CPG-based code representation, (2) dual-agent vulnerability discovery with context compression, (3) dataflow-guided slicing with Tree-sitter-based syntactic reconstruction, (4) LLM-based path filtering with Top-K selection, and (5) adversarial debate for CVSS v3-aligned severity classification. Experiments on a benchmark of 594 CVEs in C/C++ demonstrate that NAVIGATE achieves a severity classification accuracy of 72.73%, F1-score of 70.0%, and MCC of 0.544. Compared to the SVACL baseline [1] (63.47% accuracy), our dataflow-guided slicing approach—which uses Joern’s inter-procedural reachableByFlows analysis to extract vulnerability-relevant code paths—improves accuracy by 9.26 percentage points.
title_zh: NAVIGATE：基于多智能体图的漏洞检测与对抗性严重性评估
abstract_zh: 自动化的漏洞严重性评估对于优先处理安全修复工作至关重要，但现有方法面临重大挑战。传统的基于文本的方法仅依赖漏洞描述，缺乏源代码中蕴含的技术深度。与此同时，大语言模型（LLMs）在代码理解方面展现出潜力，但难以处理长输入序列且缺乏结构化语义信息，导致严重性预测不可靠。本文提出NAVIGATE——一种以图为中心的多智能体框架，将代码属性图（CPGs）与基于LLM的推理相结合，实现自动化漏洞严重性评估。其关键创新在于部署了一个自主的ReAct（推理+行动）智能体，并配备文档子智能体用于动态查询生成，从而无需依赖预定义的静态规则即可发现复杂漏洞模式。另一个核心贡献是基于AG2（AutoGen 2）的对抗式多智能体辩论机制，其中安全分析师、红队专家、蓝队专家和严重性法官智能体通过结构化审议达成共识性的严重性评级。我们的方法采用多阶段流水线，包括：（1）基于CPG的代码表示；（2）带有上下文压缩的双智能体漏洞发现；（3）基于Tree-sitter语法重构的数据流引导切片；（4）基于LLM的路径过滤与Top-K选择；（5）面向CVSS v3对齐的严重性分类的对抗式辩论。在包含594个C/C++漏洞（CVE）的基准测试上，NAVIGATE实现了72.73%的严重性分类准确率、70.0%的F1分数和0.544的马修斯相关系数（MCC）。与基线方法SVACL [1]（63.47%准确率）相比，我们的数据流引导切片方法——利用Joern的跨过程reachableByFlows分析提取漏洞相关代码路径——将准确率提升了9.26个百分点。

title: SPPFuzz: A State-Aware Process Pool Based Black-Box Fuzzing Framework for Network Protocols
authors: Yining Liuli, Yan Cao, Xuan Qi
publish: 2026 9th International Conference on Advanced Electronic Technology, Computers and Software Engineering (AETCSE)
abstract: The throughput of stateful network protocol fuzzing is fundamentally constrained by initialization overhead, full-state resets, and kernel protocol stack latency. This paper presents SPPFuzz, a black-box framework that addresses these limitations through three core mechanisms. First, the State-Aware Process Pool employs Dirty-Page-Aware Snapshot Recovery (DPASR) to minimize reset costs by tracking soft-dirty pages. Second, Protocol Semantic Mapping reconstructs network interface semantics in user space to achieve zero-copy communication. Third, Memory Behavior Feedback (MBF) infers internal protocol states by exploiting dirty-page distribution characteristics. Experiments on ProFuzzBench demonstrate that SPPFuzz achieves 17.37× to 38.20× throughput improvement over AFLNet. Furthermore, the framework outperforms the baseline by triggering 4.3× more unique crashes in total and discovering over 3× more unique states.
title_zh: SPPFuzz：一种基于状态感知进程池的网络协议黑盒模糊测试框架
abstract_zh: 有状态网络协议模糊测试的吞吐量从根本上受到初始化开销、全状态重置和内核协议栈延迟的制约。本文提出SPPFuzz，一个通过三种核心机制解决上述限制的黑盒框架。首先，状态感知进程池采用脏页感知快照恢复（DPASR）技术，通过追踪软脏页来最小化重置成本。其次，协议语义映射在用户空间重建网络接口语义，实现零拷贝通信。第三，内存行为反馈（MBF）利用脏页分布特征推断内部协议状态。在ProFuzzBench上的实验表明，SPPFuzz的吞吐量较AFLNet提升17.37倍至38.20倍。此外，该框架相比基线触发4.3倍以上的独特崩溃总数，并发现3倍以上的独特状态。

title: Clock Tree Power Optimization Method Based on Optimal Pre-merging Greedy Search
authors: Xinnan Xu, Xubin Ping, Kang Li, Zhenglei Huang, Hongliang Zhan, Xueyuan Ma, Ran Zhang
publish: 2026 9th International Conference on Advanced Electronic Technology, Computers and Software Engineering (AETCSE)
abstract: As semiconductor technology pushes ever deeper into the nanometer regime, worldwide demand for computing performance is surging dramatically. The trend has driven ever-higher integration densities within chips. As a result, the power consumption of the chip keeps growing when it is in active mode. Among the various sources of power consumption, clock tree power represents a significant share, making its design a vital element in the physical design flow. This paper addresses two issues in the clock tree synthesis stage of traditional physical design flow, including the excessive redundancy of clock gating cells, and the insufficient merging of clock gating that share the same input clock. To resolve these issues, this paper presents a clock gating merging method based on a greedy strategy. The goal of this method is to reduce power consumption by optimizing the clock tree structure. Experimental results show that the proposed method reduce the number of clock gating cells and shorten the clock tree wire length, which simplify the clock tree structure. In addition, this method lowers switching power by 12.17%, internal power by 0.53%, and leakage power by 1.34% without affecting timing constraints. Compared with the traditional physical design flow and the optimization algorithms embedded in tool, the proposed method achieves better power optimization performance.
title_zh: 基于最优预合并贪心搜索的时钟树功耗优化方法
abstract_zh: 随着半导体技术不断深入纳米尺度，全球对计算性能的需求急剧增长。这一趋势推动了芯片内部集成密度的持续提升，导致芯片在活跃模式下的功耗不断攀升。在各类功耗来源中，时钟树功耗占据显著比例，因此其设计成为物理设计流程中的关键环节。本文针对传统物理设计流程中时钟树综合阶段的两个问题展开研究：时钟门控单元过度冗余，以及共享同一输入时钟的时钟门控合并不足。为解决这些问题，本文提出一种基于贪婪策略的时钟门控合并方法。该方法旨在通过优化时钟树结构来降低功耗。实验结果表明，所提方法减少了时钟门控单元的数量，缩短了时钟树线长，从而简化了时钟树结构。此外，该方法在保持时序约束不受影响的前提下，将开关功耗降低12.17%、内部功耗降低0.53%、漏电功耗降低1.34%。与传统的物理设计流程及工具内置的优化算法相比，该方法实现了更优的功耗优化性能。

title: Engineering LLM-based Multi-Agent Systems: A Taxonomy of Emerging Frameworks
authors: Davide Di Ruscio, Phuong T. Nguyen, Claudio Di Sipio, Riccardo Rubei, Juri Di Rocco
publish: IEEE Software
abstract: LLM–based multi-agent systems (LMAS) are emerging as a promising paradigm, enabling specialized agents to collaborate and act autonomously across complex software engineering (SE) tasks. Yet, despite rapid progress, the field still lacks a clear conceptual foundation to guide researchers and practitioners in systematically designing, implementing, and evaluating such systems. This article introduces a taxonomy intended to provide practical guidance for integrating LMAS into software development workflows. Grounded in an analysis of prominent frameworks and scientific contributions for engineering LMAS, the taxonomy organizes the design space along five key dimensions offering a structured lens for understanding and engineering LMAS. Our analysis reveals substantial gaps in current frameworks, particularly regarding monitoring, performance evaluation, and quality assessment. These findings highlight pressing research challenges and identify concrete directions toward more reliable, transparent, and effective agentic systems for SE.
title_zh: 工程化基于LLM的多智能体系统：新兴框架分类法
abstract_zh: 基于大语言模型的多智能体系统（LMAS）正成为一种有前景的范式，它使专业智能体能够协作并自主完成复杂的软件工程（SE）任务。然而，尽管进展迅速，该领域仍缺乏清晰的概念基础来指导研究人员和从业者系统地设计、实施和评估此类系统。本文提出了一种分类法，旨在为将LMAS集成到软件开发工作流程中提供实用指导。该分类法基于对主流框架及LMAS工程科学贡献的分析，沿五个关键维度组织设计空间，为理解和工程化LMAS提供了结构化视角。我们的分析揭示了当前框架中的显著空白，特别是在监控、性能评估和质量评价方面。这些发现指出了紧迫的研究挑战，并确定了实现更可靠、透明且高效的软件工程智能体系统的具体方向。

title: The Code Council: Orchestrating Heterogeneous Large Language Models for Robust Programming Scaffolding
authors: Daniel M. Muepu, Yutaka Watanobe, Md Faizul Ibne Amin, Md. Shahajada Mia
publish: IEEE Access
abstract: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have made it feasible to use them as automated debugging tutors, but it remains unclear how much can be gained by moving from single-model tutors to multi-agent councils with separated roles. We study this question in an offline simulation on 200 debugging cases drawn from an online judge, spanning 20 problems split into course-style and contest-style challenge tracks. We compare four single-model tutors based on current frontier models with four councils that assign models to Architect, Skeptic, Secretary, Pedagogue, and Mentor roles and operate in both Blind and Guided modes. Single-model tutors achieve near-perfect repair on course problems but perform less reliably on challenge cases and often rewrite large portions of student code, show non-negligible false positive rates, and leak full or near-full solutions in a substantial share of hints. Councils designed around measured model strengths improve both technical and pedagogical behaviour. On the challenge track, the best council raises patch success by 12.2 percentage points over the best single tutor, while reducing false positives, shrinking median patch size, improving hint localisation, and cutting solution leakage in Blind mode from about one fifth of hints to under ten percent. Councils also exhibit higher stability across reruns and produce hints that two independent instructors consistently rate as more useful and better scaffolded. Guided mode, where internal components see a reference solution, yields further technical gains but introduces leakage risks that require prompt tightening and a sanitising Secretary to control the flow of ground truth. Additional trap experiments with poisoned reference solutions show a mix of resistance and fail-safe collapse rather than systematic poisoning of hints. These results indicate that orchestration and information flow are powerful levers and that well-designed councils can provide more reliable and pedagogically aligned debugging support than strong single-model tutors alone.
title_zh: 代码委员会：编排异构大型语言模型以实现稳健的编程脚手架
abstract_zh: 近期大型语言模型（LLMs）的进展使其作为自动化调试导师成为可能，但尚不清楚从单一模型导师转向具有分工角色的多智能体委员会能带来多大提升。我们在一个离线模拟中，基于在线评测系统提取的200个调试案例（涵盖20道题目，分课程式与竞赛式挑战赛道）研究了这一问题。我们将四种前沿单一模型导师与四种委员会进行比较——后者将模型分配至架构师、怀疑者、秘书、教育家和导师角色，并以盲模式和引导模式运行。单一模型导师在课程问题上实现了近乎完美的修复，但在挑战案例中表现不稳定，常大幅重写学生代码，存在不可忽视的误报率，并在相当比例的提示中泄露完整或近乎完整的解决方案。围绕模型优势设计的委员会改善了技术行为与教学行为。在挑战赛道上，最佳委员会将补丁成功率较最佳单一导师提升了12.2个百分点，同时降低了误报率，缩小了中位补丁大小，改进了提示定位，并在盲模式下将解决方案泄露从约五分之一降至不足10%。委员会在多次运行中展现出更高的稳定性，其提示被两位独立教师持续评为更有用且支架更佳。在引导模式下，内部组件可见参考解决方案，这带来了技术上的进一步提升，但引入了泄露风险，需要通过收紧提示和净化秘书来控制真实信息的流动。额外的毒参考解决方案陷阱实验显示，委员会表现出抵抗与失效崩溃的混合反应，而非系统性地提示中毒。这些结果表明，编排与信息流是强大的杠杆，设计良好的委员会能提供比强大单一模型导师更可靠、更符合教学法的调试支持。

title: Analysis of Information Security Risks and Countermeasures in the Era of Big Data
authors: Zhoubin Teng, Qichen Lu, Zhuoyi Shen, Yaoyan Cai, Yirun Chi, Lei Zhang
publish: 2026 International Conference on Generative Artificial Intelligence and Information Security (GAIIS)
abstract: Software vulnerability management is a critical inherent part of the software development lifecycle, with organizations investing heavily in early flaw detection. As Zhejiang Province advances in-depth digital transformation, government information projects undergo increasingly frequent regular iterations. For instance, the 42 core projects operated and maintained by Zhejiang Provincial Department of Emergency Management see over 15 annual iterations on average, and traditional code security auditing models are ill-suited to this demand. Due to its lack of awareness of program runtime environments and custom sanitization functions, static analysis yields reports with persistently high false positive rates—25%-40% for mainstream market tools, and a relatively high 18%-28% even for government-customized ones. Extensive manual review is costly and time-consuming, failing to meet the security testing needs of high-frequency project updates.To address this core challenge, this paper proposes a hybrid security analysis framework designed to automatically convert candidate vulnerability sets into exploitable true positive sets with high accuracy. First, a static analysis module runs in parallel to generate candidate vulnerability sets, while an independent runtime information collection module operates to acquire actual execution contexts. Subsequently, a correlation mapping module integrates the two to produce a guidance set incorporating runtime contexts. Based on this guidance set, the system automatically generates customized attack configurations to filter out true positive sets. By calculating discrepancies between candidate vulnerability sets and true positive sets, potential false positive sets are derived, and sanitization patterns unrecognized by static analysis are extracted and fed back to the static analysis rule base. This mechanism enables continuous automated optimization of static analysis tools, effectively resolving the efficiency and accuracy dilemmas of code auditing in the iteration of government information projects and providing an efficient and scalable solution for modern code auditing and application security testing.
title_zh: 大数据时代信息安全风险与对策分析
abstract_zh:
软件漏洞管理是软件开发生命周期中至关重要的组成部分，各类组织在早期缺陷检测方面投入巨大。随着浙江省深入推进数字化转型，政府信息化项目迭代更新日益频繁。以浙江省应急管理厅建设运维的42个核心项目为例，年均迭代次数超过15次，传统的代码安全审计模式难以适应这一需求。由于静态分析缺乏对程序运行时环境和自定义消毒函数的认知，其生成的报告存在持续性的高误报率——主流市场工具为25%-40%，即便政府定制化工具也高达18%-28%，大量人工复核成本高、耗时长，无法满足高频项目更新的安全测试需求。

针对这一核心挑战，本文提出一种混合安全分析框架，旨在将候选漏洞集自动转化为高准确度的可利用真阳性集。首先，静态分析模块并行运行生成候选漏洞集，同时独立运行的运行时信息收集模块获取实际执行上下文。随后，关联映射模块将两者结合，生成包含运行时上下文的指导集。基于该指导集，系统自动生成定制化攻击配置，以筛选出真阳性集。通过计算候选漏洞集与真阳性集的差异，推导出潜在误报集，并提取静态分析无法识别的消毒模式，将其反馈至静态分析规则库。这一机制实现了静态分析工具的持续自动化优化，有效解决了政府信息化项目迭代中代码审计的效率与准确性困境，为现代代码审计与应用安全测试提供了高效且可扩展的解决方案。

title: Essence Coach: A Bot for Software Practice Adoption
authors: Sonia Nicoletti, Paolo Ciancarini
publish: Proceedings of the 2026 7th International Workshop on Bots and Agents in Software Engineering
abstract: None

title: Bit-Compressed Concurrent Fault Simulation with Efficient Fault List
authors: Feng Gu, Zhiteng Chao, Hui Wang, Jianan Mu, Mingjun Wang, Jun Gao, Yonghao Wang, Jing Ye, Xiaowei Li, Huawei Li
publish: IEEE Transactions on Computer-Aided Design of Integrated Circuits and Systems
abstract: As the automotive industry advances toward intelligent systems, the risk of chip failures in automotive applications has grown. Functional safety has thus become essential to ensure the reliability of automotive-grade chips. Sequential circuit fault simulation is a key part of functional safety and a major bottleneck in safety verification. The concurrent fault simulation (CFS) method is the most widely used algorithm for this purpose and is adopted in the leading commercial tool Z01X. While recent academic efforts have primarily extended CFS to the RTL level simulation, the fundamental gate level CFS algorithm has seen little improvement, despite its critical role in simulation performance. Two main issues in concurrent fault simulation are inefficient storage and computation of logic values, and performance limitations in its core component, the concurrent fault list. To address these issues, we propose a dual optimization strategy: (1) a bit-compression method that reduces memory overhead and enables fully O(1) time gate evaluation, and (2) a scan list-based concurrent fault list implementation that improves efficiency with low time/space complexity and superior space locality. Experimental results show that our method achieves an average speedup of 6.10× over commercial tool Z01X, with gains exceeding 3× on large circuits, and 2.58× over academic simulator VISION, proving its strong practical value.
title_zh: 采用高效故障列表的位压缩并发故障模拟
abstract_zh: 随着汽车行业向智能系统迈进，汽车应用中芯片故障的风险不断增加。因此，功能安全成为确保车规级芯片可靠性的关键。时序电路故障仿真是功能安全的重要组成部分，也是安全验证中的主要瓶颈。并发故障仿真（CFS）方法是目前应用最广泛的算法，并被主流商业工具Z01X采用。尽管近年学术研究主要将CFS扩展到寄存器传输级仿真，但基础的门级CFS算法在仿真性能方面改进甚微。并发故障仿真存在两个主要问题：逻辑值的存储和计算效率低下，以及其核心组件——并发故障列表的性能瓶颈。为解决这些问题，我们提出了一种双重优化策略：（1）一种位压缩方法，可减少内存开销并实现完全的O(1)时间门级评估；（2）一种基于扫描列表的并发故障列表实现，以低时间/空间复杂度和优越的空间局部性提升效率。实验结果表明，我们的方法相比商业工具Z01X平均加速6.10倍，在大规模电路上加速超过3倍，相比学术仿真器VISION加速2.58倍，证明了其强大的实用价值。

title: A SAT-Hard Compound Logic Locking Scheme with Empirical Resistance to Known Structural Attacks
authors: Sonali Shukla, Govind Rajhans Jadhav, Durgesh Sardan, Suryakant Toraskar, Jaynarayan T Tudu, Makoto Ikeda, Masahiro Fujita, Virendra Singh
publish: 2026 IEEE 29th International Symposium on Design and Diagnostics of Electronic Circuits and Systems (DDECS)
abstract: Logic Locking aims to hide the original functionality of the design using a secret key. It protects hardware intellectual properties (IPs) against IP piracy or IC overproduction. However, an attacker analyzes the structural traces and/or uses Boolean satisfiability based technique called SAT attack to break such logic locking schemes. This motivates us to find a logic locking technique that can work against both SAT and structural analysis attacks. Therefore, this paper introduces a novel multiplier-based logic locking scheme. Leveraging the inherent complexity of multiplier circuits, the proposed scheme exponentially increases the time required for each iteration of a SAT attack. Moreover, a heuristic is also proposed to identify appropriate locations for inserting multiplier instances to increase the number of iterations. The multiplier-based logic locking scheme is further combined with the Anti-SAT scheme to create a robust and effective defense mechanism against SAT attacks and the various other attacks exploiting structural traces. The proposed technique is resilient to the state-of-the-art attack dedicated to the existing compound logic locking schemes. Moreover, the proposed compound logic locking scheme, requires half the number of key inputs than the state-of-the-art logic locking scheme while providing the similar level of security.
title_zh: 一种对已知结构攻击具有经验抵抗性的SAT难解复合逻辑锁定方案
abstract_zh: 逻辑锁定旨在通过使用密钥隐藏设计的原始功能，从而保护硬件知识产权（IP）免受IP盗版或集成电路过度生产的影响。然而，攻击者会分析结构痕迹，并/或利用基于布尔可满足性的SAT攻击技术来破解此类逻辑锁定方案。这促使我们寻找一种既能抵御SAT攻击，又能对抗结构分析攻击的逻辑锁定技术。因此，本文提出了一种新颖的基于乘法器的逻辑锁定方案。该方案利用乘法器电路固有的复杂性，指数级地增加了每次SAT攻击迭代所需的时间。此外，还提出了一种启发式方法，用于识别插入乘法器实例的合适位置，从而增加迭代次数。该基于乘法器的逻辑锁定方案进一步与Anti-SAT方案相结合，形成了一种针对SAT攻击及其他利用结构痕迹的攻击的强大有效的防御机制。所提出的技术能够抵御针对现有复合逻辑锁定方案的最先进攻击。此外，与当前最先进的逻辑锁定方案相比，所提出的复合逻辑锁定方案在提供相同安全级别的同时，所需的密钥输入数量减少了一半。

title: UART Design and Verification of Compatible Baud Rate Communication
authors: Esakki Rajavel S, Kashwin M S, Pravin A, Vinoth Rajkumar G, Viniston Suthahar J, D J Joel Devadass Daniel
publish: 2026 Third International Conference on Networking and Communications (ICNWC)
abstract: Universal Asynchronous Receiver/Transmitter commonly know as UART is serial, asynchronous, full-duplex communication protocol which is widely used in the embedded systems and microcontrollers. This paper uses Verilog HDL to design the advanced UART architecture to enhances the auto baud rate detection using adaptive control logic. The design modules contain baud rate generator, transmitter, receiver, Asynchronous FIFO and adaptive control logic and the majority of conventional UART designs has only 8 -bit data transfer in this design we extend the data size to 32-bit and Most of the existing UART has fixed baud rate communication here we proposed the dynamic baud rate detection which the baud rate will be changed upon the data size, if the data size is < 8 it will select 9600 and if it is >14 it will select 115200 for the reliable transmission and receives and verifies the functionality using system verilog and functional verification and constraint random verification, to verify the functionality of the design. All the codes written in Verilog HDL and System verilog for verification using Xillinx vivado and EDA playground.
title_zh: 兼容波特率通信的UART设计与验证
abstract_zh: 通用异步收发器（UART）是一种串行、异步、全双工的通信协议，广泛应用于嵌入式系统和微控制器中。本文采用Verilog硬件描述语言设计了一种先进的UART架构，通过自适应控制逻辑增强了自动波特率检测功能。设计模块包括波特率发生器、发送器、接收器、异步FIFO和自适应控制逻辑；大多数传统UART设计仅支持8位数据传输，而本设计将数据位宽扩展至32位。此外，现有UART多为固定波特率通信，本文提出的动态波特率检测可根据数据位宽调整波特率：当数据位宽小于8时选择9600波特率，大于14时选择115200波特率，以确保可靠传输。系统采用SystemVerilog进行功能验证和约束随机验证，以验证设计功能。所有代码使用Verilog HDL和SystemVerilog编写，并在Xilinx Vivado和EDA Playground平台上完成验证。

title: Embedded Tutorial: AI Vs. Verification Engineer: Fight or Synergy?
authors: Marcela Zachariasova
publish: 2026 IEEE 29th International Symposium on Design and Diagnostics of Electronic Circuits and Systems (DDECS)
abstract: The paper investigates the application of Artificial Intelligence (AI) algorithms in two critical areas of simulationbased verification: (1) the development of verification testbenches (2) debugging activities within simulation environments. The primary objective is to assess how AI can enhance the productivity of verification engineers and improve the overall efficiency and quality of verification workflows in industrial practice. The paper presents the role of functional verification in the chip development flow, reviews widely adopted verification methodologies, AI techniques already used for automation and analysis, as well as the recent state-of-the-art research activities targeting emerging verification challenges. A key contribution is the identification of a significant gap in publicly available, high-quality open-source datasets tailored specifically for training AI models in hardware verification tasks. To ground the discussion in industrial reality, the paper also presents results from a survey conducted among 50 verification engineers, providing insight into which parts of a testbench could most benefit from AI-driven code generation or AI assistance. By combining a comprehensive state-of-the-art review with empirical insights from industry practitioners, this paper provides a structured analysis of current limitations and outlines concrete future research directions aligned with realworld verification needs.
title_zh: 嵌入式教程：AI 与验证工程师：对抗还是协同？
abstract_zh: 本文探讨了人工智能（AI）算法在基于仿真的验证中两个关键领域的应用：（1）验证测试平台的开发；（2）仿真环境中的调试活动。主要目标是评估AI如何提升验证工程师的生产力，并提高工业实践中验证工作流的整体效率与质量。论文阐述了功能验证在芯片开发流程中的作用，回顾了广泛采用的验证方法、已用于自动化分析和研究的AI技术，以及针对新兴验证挑战的最新前沿研究。一项关键贡献是识别出在公开可用的高质量开源数据集方面存在的显著缺口——这些数据集专门用于训练硬件验证任务的AI模型。为使讨论扎根于工业现实，论文还呈现了一项针对50名验证工程师的调研结果，揭示了测试平台中哪些部分最可能受益于AI驱动的代码生成或AI辅助。通过将全面的前沿综述与行业从业者的实证见解相结合，本文对当前局限性进行了结构化分析，并勾勒出与实际验证需求相符的具体未来研究方向。

title: Research on Macro Placement Optimization Algorithm for Integrated Circuits Based on Improved Q-Learning
authors: Hongyu Jiang
publish: 2026 9th International Conference on Advanced Electronic Technology, Computers and Software Engineering (AETCSE)
abstract: With the continuous increase in integrated circuit scale, macro placement has become an extremely challenging NP-hard problem in physical design. Traditional placement algorithms struggle to simultaneously minimize wirelength, satisfy density constraints, and control congestion. This paper proposes DQPlace, an improved Q-Learning-based macro placement optimization algorithm. The placement problem is modeled as a Markov Decision Process. Double DQN is adopted to eliminate Q-value overestimation, ResNet-18 extracts canvas image features, a 4-layer 8-head GAT captures netlist hypergraph structural features, and a macro priority sorting mechanism is introduced. The reward function comprehensively considers half-perimeter wirelength increment, density violation, and congestion penalty to achieve multi-objective immediate optimization. Experiments on the ISPD-2005 benchmark suite show that, compared with the PPO method, DQPlace reduces HPWL by 8.2% on average, peak density by 6.6%, congestion rate by 17.1%, and runtime by 19%, while demonstrating strong generalization on unseen circuits. Ablation studies further verify the effectiveness of the Double DQN, GAT, and priority sorting modules. This work provides a new perspective for the application of deep reinforcement learning in the EDA field.
title_zh: 基于改进Q学习的集成电路宏放置优化算法研究
abstract_zh: 随着集成电路规模的不断增大，宏单元布局已成为物理设计中极具挑战性的NP-hard问题。传统布局算法难以同时实现线长最小化、满足密度约束以及控制拥塞。本文提出DQPlace，一种基于改进Q-Learning的宏单元布局优化算法。将布局问题建模为马尔可夫决策过程。采用Double DQN消除Q值过估计，ResNet-18提取画布图像特征，4层8头GAT捕获网表超图结构特征，并引入宏单元优先级排序机制。奖励函数综合考虑半周长线长增量、密度违规和拥塞惩罚，实现多目标即时优化。在ISPD-2005基准测试套件上的实验表明，与PPO方法相比，DQPlace平均减少HPWL 8.2%、峰值密度6.6%、拥塞率17.1%以及运行时间19%，同时在新电路上展现出强泛化能力。消融实验进一步验证了Double DQN、GAT和优先级排序模块的有效性。该工作为深度强化学习在EDA领域的应用提供了新视角。

title: Hybrid Random Forest–Reinforcement Learning Framework for Efficient Verification of PCIe 6.0 SoC Designs
authors: Santhi K, Chellaswamy C
publish: 2026 International Conference on Smart Electronic Devices and Intelligent Systems (ICSEDIS)
abstract: The increasing complexity of high-speed System-on-Chip (SoC) interconnects, particularly with the adoption of PCI Express (PCIe) 6.0, poses significant challenges for conventional functional verification methodologies. Advanced features such as PAM4 signaling, forward error correction (FEC), and higher bandwidth demand intelligent verification strategies capable of accelerating coverage closure and improving corner-case detection. To address these challenges, this paper proposes a hybrid verification framework that integrates Random Forest–based anomaly classification with Reinforcement Learning–driven adaptive stimulus generation within a Universal Verification Methodology (UVM) environment. The Random Forest model analyzes simulation-generated protocol features to identify violations and predict coverage gaps, while the reinforcement learning agent dynamically guides stimulus generation toward high-risk and untested scenarios. Experimental evaluation on a PCIe 6.0 verification platform demonstrates that the proposed framework achieves 95–97% functional coverage, reduces simulation cycles by 25–40%, and improves anomaly detection accuracy to 92% compared to conventional and AI-only baseline approaches. By combining data-driven learning with traditional verification flows, the proposed approach offers a scalable, efficient, and practical solution for verifying next-generation high-speed SoC designs, particularly in resource-constrained verification environments.
title_zh: 面向PCIe 6.0 SoC设计高效验证的混合随机森林–强化学习框架
abstract_zh: 高速系统级芯片（SoC）互连的日益复杂性，特别是随着PCI Express（PCIe）6.0的采用，给传统的功能验证方法带来了重大挑战。PAM4信令、前向纠错（FEC）和更高带宽等先进特性，要求采用能够加速覆盖率收敛并提升边界案例检测能力的智能验证策略。为应对这些挑战，本文提出了一种混合验证框架，该框架将基于随机森林的异常分类与强化学习驱动的自适应激励生成集成于通用验证方法学（UVM）环境之中。随机森林模型分析仿真生成的协议特征以识别违规并预测覆盖率缺口，而强化学习代理则动态引导激励生成朝向高风险和未测试场景。在PCIe 6.0验证平台上的实验评估表明，与传统的和纯人工智能的基准方法相比，所提出的框架实现了95-97%的功能覆盖率，将仿真周期减少了25-40%，并将异常检测准确率提升至92%。通过将数据驱动学习与传统验证流程相结合，所提出的方法为验证下一代高速SoC设计提供了一种可扩展、高效且实用的解决方案，尤其在资源受限的验证环境中优势显著。
